ab: kemudakuda yu muka i tallabiyaw?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: mipalidring ku muka i tallabiyaw.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: kemudakuda muka i paaisingan taytaw?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: kemakawang muka i paaisingan taytaw.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: kemudakuda yu muka i Peng-hu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: muisatr ku dra hikuki muka i Peng-hu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: kemudakuda yu muka i Peng-hu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: muisatr ku dra sasudang muka i Peng-hu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: muisatr yu dra manay muruma?
en: How do you go home?

ab: muisatr ku dra ciē-yun muruma.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: muisatr dra manay muka i takesian i Agam?
en: How does Agam go to school?

ab: muisatr dra igiw muka i takesian i Agam.
en: Agam goes to school by train.

ab: muisatr dra manay muka i kiyukay i Kiring?
en: How does Kiring go to church?

ab: midinsiya muka i kiyukay i Kiring.
en: Kiring goes to church by bicycle.

ab: muisatr yu dra ciē-yun muka i takesian?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: adri, muisatr ku dra bas muka i takesian.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: midinsiya yu muka i takesian?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: aiwa, midinsiya ku muka i takesian.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: muisatr yu kana pakesup na igiw muka i Takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: aiwa, muisatr ku kana pakesup na igiw muka i Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: muisatr yu dra igiw? adri i, dra hikuki muka i Balangaw?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機？
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: muisatr ku dra hikuki. maraarei dra igiw na hikuki.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: muisatr yu dra bas? adri i, mipalidring yu muka i kiyukay?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車？
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: mipalidring ku muka i kiyukay. marakalleayan dra bas an mipalidring ta.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: adallep i supemarekit mu ruma?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: adri adallep. miutubay ku muka i supemarekit.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: adallep i takesian na iyu-ci?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: adallep. kemakawang ta muka.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: adallep i siyataw na aekaekanan?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: mupatraran ta i siyataw aw kemakawang ta dra lluwatra trektrek i, meredek ta lla.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
